resources.string: Welcome to XYZ Fitness Center!\n\nYour journey to a healthier lifestyle starts here. Explore our plans and meet our trainers using the menu.

Workout Plans:

• Weight Loss: Intense cardio and diet plan
• Cardio: Improve heart health and stamina
• Muscle Building: Strength training and protein intake
• Yoga: Flexibility and mental peace

Our Expert Trainers:

1. John Doe
Specialization: Weight Loss & Nutrition

2. Jane Smith
Specialization: Cardio & HIIT

3. Mike Ross
Specialization: Powerlifting & Strength

Membership Packages:

• Basic: $20/month (Gym access)
• Pro: $50/month (Gym + Group Classes)
• Elite: $80/month (Gym + Personal Trainer + Spa)
About Us:\n\nFounded in 2010, XYZ Fitness Center is a world-class facility equipped with the latest technology and expert guidance to help you reach your fitness goals.

Contact Us:

Email: contact@xyzfitness.com
Phone: +1 234 567 890
Address: 123 Fitness St, Health City
